programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Dave and Gemma seriously consider a major life change, it sends ripples through the family and strains relationships; wedding chaos and unexpected revelations complicate plans for Malcolm and Marty.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette tries to fix up her run-down car to get it re-registered, Gregg encourages her to buy a new one to save money; Barb tries to teach everyone DMV robbery protocols.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a big city donor is murdered inside her apartment, the team tracks down the young killer who leads them into a crypto scam he's been running with one of his victims, looking to seek revenge on his family.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: CIA
programme.desc: When a foreign diplomat is killed after sneaking into the U.S. under unknown circumstances, Colin and Bill discover that a rare mineral with potential to disrupt international relations may be the reason he was targeted.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Judge Judy lays down the law when a defendant cops an attitude; a woman says she rescued another woman from a bad relationship, then kicked her out after finding drugs in her room.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Money for Nothing!; Mystery Shopper Injustice?; Payday Intercepted!
programme.desc: When a car turns out to be a lemon, the seller keeps the buyer's family's money; a friend wants repayment for a bad check; a man sues his friend's estranged wife for stealing his insurance check.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As a secret immunity deal threatens to let a man walk free, Parker fights to keep the case alive; when Parker's estranged sister suddenly appears -- and buried family wounds resurface -- the battle for justice becomes deeply personal.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins
programme.desc: With the Camp Pendleton office in danger of being shut down, the team confronts an uncertain future.

programme.desc: The death of a former Marine wanted for murder leads the team to a sinister plot involving a disgraced journalist, one of Australia's richest men and lab-grown diamonds.

programme.sub-title: Grieving Siblings Demand Justice!; Repossession Romance Fail
programme.desc: Siblings accuse their late sister's neighbor of selling her belongings; a woman sues her ex for repayment of a loan, which he says was a gift.
